text.message: Why would u do that red
Now neither of us can win
You might have had a chance if you took 6,9,12 red
all this beause of a sheep port ?
Sorry red has a smooth brain
orange is mad because everyone cornered him
orange if you took 6.9.12 you could have built
but you were aging and took my port
You should’ve built your second settlement there to begin with
but I didnt want you to monopolize sheep
Blocking one player is not how you play
Purposely losing and ruining both our games just to stop me from a sheep port
I had a plan to take the north
